channel.title: SaaS on Midhun Kumar | Profile
channel.description: Recent content in SaaS on Midhun Kumar | Profile

item.title: Building Sentinel: Compliance Software for Australian Hospitality
item.description:
I work at Dorset Gardens Hotel in Melbourne’s Eastern suburbs — a JMS Hospitality property with gaming facilities, a bistro, a nightclub, and motel rooms. It is a busy, multi-department operation, and like every licensed venue in Victoria, it runs on compliance: RSA certifications, Food Safety certificates, gaming machine authorisations, and AML/CTF obligations that come with holding a gaming licence.

Managing all of that across one venue is already complex. Managing it across four venues in Greater Melbourne — with different staff rosters, expiry dates, and regulatory requirements — is a real operational problem. That problem became the starting point for Sentinel.
